hero.title: You are not alone in your grief
hero.subtitle: We are a non-profit organisation supporting suicide loss survivors, family members, friends and loved ones who have lost someone to suicide.

about.heading: About us
about.body: Livslust och hållbart stöd was founded by survivors for survivors. We know from experience how overwhelming grief can feel, and how important it is to meet people who truly understand. Our organisation offers a safe place to share, heal and find a way forward, at your own pace, without expectations.

offer.heading: What we offer
offer.groups_body: Regular support groups in Stockholm and online, where you can meet others in similar situations.
offer.talk_body: Individual conversations with a volunteer supporter who listens without judgement and understands the loss.
offer.resources_body: Book recommendations, articles and guides on grief and suicide loss.

crisis.heading: Need crisis help right now?
crisis.mind: Mind Crisis Helpline: 90101 (24/7, anonymous — available in Swedish)
crisis.vardguiden: 1177 Vårdguiden — call 1177 for medical advice (in Sweden)
crisis.note: If there is immediate danger, call 112.

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.intro: Reach out to us, we will reply as soon as we can. You do not need to have all the words ready. We listen.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

footer.rights: © {{year}} Livslust och hållbart stöd. Non-profit organisation.

activities.heading: What we do
activities.intro: We offer several forms of support and community, adapted to different needs and life situations.
activities.samtalstrafar_body: We hold regular support gatherings where bereaved individuals can come together in a safe space to share experiences and support one another. In many cases we arrange parallel sessions at the same venue so that more people can take part at once.
activities.knata_body: A walking group for the bereaved where movement and conversation meet in nature. We have groups open to all survivors as well as a group specifically for men. Walking together lowers the threshold and opens the door to natural conversation.
activities.forelasningar_body: We give presentations on suicide loss, grief and support at schools, workplaces, hospitals and other organisations. The aim is to increase understanding and reduce stigma around mental illness and suicide.
activities.sorgbearbetning_body: We provide grief processing work in accordance with the Swedish Grief Institute. The goal is to give bereaved individuals practical tools to process their loss in a sustainable and structured way.
activities.digitala_body: For those who cannot attend in person we offer support gatherings via video call. The digital format means that more people can access support regardless of where in the country they are.
